Find Us

Located in the heart of Hong Kong, Sangeet is easy to reach by public transport or car.

Sangeet Restaurant

Hong Kong

Open in Google Maps

Getting Here

By MTR

Nearest MTR station is a 5-minute walk. Take Exit B and walk straight.

By Car

Parking is available in the nearby car park. Street parking also available evenings and weekends.

Sangeet Restaurant
Hong Kong

Opening Hours

Monday – Friday11:00 AM – 10:00 PM
Saturday – Sunday10:00 AM – 11:00 PM
SangeetRestaurant

Authentic Indian & Nepali cuisine crafted with love and tradition, right in the heart of Hong Kong.
